events.text: Dan James (Wales) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Wales 0, England 1. Marcus Rashford (England) from a free kick with a right footed shot to the top right corner.
Goal!  Wales 0, England 2. Phil Foden (England) left footed shot from the left side of the six yard box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Harry Kane with a cross.
Aaron Ramsey (Wales) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Wales 0, England 3. Marcus Rashford (England) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Kalvin Phillips.
